fonts.usage: Body text, UI elements, Buttons, Task Lists
Code snippets, Task IDs, Timestamps, Audit Logs

rules: NO INTER or SPACE GROTESK fonts.
Headings (Size > 32px): MUST use tight letter spacing: tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines / Labels: MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-widest / tracking-[0.2em]).
Line Height: Tight (leading-none) for headers, Loose (leading-relaxed) for body text.

colors.strategy: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) mixed with Linear's precision. Monochrome base with Ultra-Marine / Klein Blue accents. No purple gradients, no teal.
rules: Avoid pure white for text in dark mode; use muted ink (#F7F8F8 equivalent).
DO NOT use pure black or gray; always tint neutrally with blue (as done in the CSS vars with hue 225/240).
Priority Badges must be strictly color-coded: P1 (Red), P2 (Orange), P3 (Blue), P4 (Neutral Gray).

surfaces: Whisper-thin borders: Use border-border/40 or border-border/50 to create delicate separation without heavy lines.
Cardless Lists: Task lists should NOT be wrapped in bulky cards. Use raw rows with a 1px border-b border-border/40. On hover, apply a subtle bg-muted/40 change.
Modals/Dialogs: Must use Glassmorphism overlay. backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 (dark mode) or bg-white/60 (light mode). The modal itself should be solid.
NEUMORPHISM FOR FLOATING BUTTON: The Global '+' button must have strong ambient drop shadow (e.g., shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]) and an inner 1px border.
animations: Hover states must always change text color AND background, e.g., hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground.
Todoist-style Circular Checkbox: Unchecked is just a 1px border. Checked state transitions background to Primary color and text to white checkmark.
Sidebar items: Hover should create a subtle inset effect, NOT a full block background.

grids_layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use Tailwind scale p-6, p-8 for containers to give elements room to breathe. Density only applies to the Data Tables/Task Lists.
grids_layouts.sidebar: Fixed width 260px. Flex column. Navigation items should have a tight gap-1 but generous padding p-2.
grids_layouts.dashboard_mode: High Density Grid (Mode B). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gaps should be gap-6. Charts span col-span-2 or col-span-3.
grids_layouts.task_detail_panel: Floating right-side panel or centered modal. Must have Tabs (Overview, Subtasks, Attachments, Comments, Activity Timeline) separated by a 1px bottom border for the tab list.

component_guidelines.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) for primary actions, subtle roundness (rounded-md) for secondary toolbars.
component_guidelines.inputs: Shadcn standard but strip aggressive focus rings. Use focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary.
component_guidelines.tabs: Override Shadcn fixed height. h-auto to prevent cutoff.
component_guidelines.calendar_date_picker: USE SHADCN Calendar component. DO NOT use native HTML <input type='date'>.
component_guidelines.select_dropdown: USE SHADCN Select/DropdownMenu. DO NOT use native HTML <select>. Ensure Dropdown has a SOLID background, never transparent.
component_guidelines.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for a dense, high-end technical feel.
component_guidelines.toasts: Use `sonner` for real-time websocket notifications and standard alerts. Located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.jsx.

login_page_background.description: Black and white photo of a minimalist building facade with vertical windows.
login_page_background.usage: Use as a split-screen background for the Login Page (auth layout) to give an architectural, enterprise feel. Apply a light overlay if needed for contrast.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA/WCAG standards. Do not put transparent backgrounds behind text unless heavily blurred.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='create-task-button', data-testid='task-item-123').

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic.
Use .js/.jsx extensions for React files, NOT .tsx.
DO NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is FORBIDDEN).
DO NOT apply universal transitions (transition: all). Target specific properties like transition-colors, transition-transform.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖, 🧠, 💡, etc.) for icons.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp buttons with interaction animations.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui. Customize them to fit the enterprise look.
Highlight and badge priorities clearly using the defined CSS variables (--priority-1 through --priority-4).

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install necessary packages: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react sonner recharts tailwind-merge clsx
instructions_to_main_agent.execution_order: 1. Set up routing (Login, Admin Dashboard, Staff Layout). 2. Build Sidebar & Shell. 3. Implement Data Grids and Task Lists. 4. Implement Task Creation Modal and Detail Panel. 5. Add WebSockets and Sonner Toasts for notifications. 6. Polish CSS variables for Light/Dark mode toggle.
